title: Paravozik will come
description:
the mod is made for a Russian audience as a joke 
THE MOST ULTRA MEGA ALPHA SIGMA OMEGA SCARY HORROR MOD!!!!!!!!! PLAY ONLY AT YOUR OWN RISK. mod adds MGE brothers
body:
**the mod is made for a Russian audience as a joke **

This is horror mod adds MGE brothers from Team Fortress. 
with each broken block something strange will happen... but after a while.
each character has their own abilities
There are currently 9 events available in the mod

engineer - replaces water blocks with stone

scout - faster

heavy - shoots but moves slowly
